Interface IPixelReader2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster

ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control a pixel reader.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("E0F724C5-5ABE-4A4D-8916-702CDA40EAA8")]
public interface IPixelReader2 : IPixelReader
